user.title: Swiss EV Charging
user.description: Track charging point availability from ich-tanke-strom.ch (SFOE). Provide a location to discover nearby stations, and/or pin specific EVSE IDs.

data.tag: Tag (applied to all stations of this entry)
data.notify_on_available: Notify when a station becomes available
data.notify_service: Notify target (any notify entity; blank = persistent notification)

error.no_selection: Provide a location (latitude/longitude) or at least one pinned EVSE ID.
